description: Replicate schema definitions for all 4 tables
acceptanceCriteria: src/convex/schema/aircraft_type.ts exists with aircraftTypeSchema using @trestleinc/replicate/server schema.define()
src/convex/schema/aircraft.ts exists with aircraftSchema
src/convex/schema/airports.ts exists with airportSchema
src/convex/schema/flights.ts exists with flightSchema including embedded landings/approaches arrays
All schemas define shape, indexes, and defaults as specified in the implementation guide
npx convex dev accepts the schema files without errors

description: Wire up Convex schema.ts and convex.config.ts
acceptanceCriteria: src/convex/schema.ts imports all 4 schemas and exports defineSchema() with all 4 tables
src/convex/convex.config.ts registers the Replicate component via defineApp()
npx convex dev deploys the schema successfully
src/convex/auth.config.ts exists with customJwt provider configuration
Uses process.env.LOGTO_ENDPOINT and process.env.LOGTO_API_IDENTIFIER
Specifies RS256 algorithm
issuer is set to LOGTO_ENDPOINT + '/oidc'
jwks is set to LOGTO_ENDPOINT + '/oidc/jwks'
applicationID uses LOGTO_API_IDENTIFIER
src/convex/model/auth.ts exists
Exports getAuthUser() that calls ctx.auth.getUserIdentity() and throws if not authenticated
Exports getUserId() that returns identity.subject (Logto sub claim)
Both functions accept QueryCtx | MutationCtx parameter

description: OOOI time parsing and duration utilities with tests
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/utils/time.ts exports parseZuluInput, resolveOoiTime, isoToZulu, durationMinutes, minutesToDecimal, minutesToHMM
parseZuluInput('2350') returns { hours: 23, minutes: 50 }
parseZuluInput('2500') returns null (invalid)
resolveOoiTime handles midnight rollover correctly (e.g. OUT=2350, OFF=0010 rolls to next day)
durationMinutes computes correct integer minutes between two ISO strings
src/lib/utils/time.spec.ts exists with tests covering normal input, midnight rollover, invalid input, and duration math
bun run test passes all time utility tests

description: Replicate server functions for all 4 tables
acceptanceCriteria: src/convex/aircraft_types.ts exports { material, delta, replicate, presence, session } via collection.create()
src/convex/aircraft.ts exports the same 5 functions
src/convex/airports.ts exports the same 5 functions
src/convex/flights.ts exports the same 5 functions
Each file imports the correct schema and uses components.replicate
npx convex dev deploys all functions successfully

description: Replicate SQLite persistence and shared Convex client
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/replicate/persistence.ts exports a SQLite persistence singleton using @trestleinc/replicate/client
src/lib/replicate/convex-client.ts exports getConvexClient() returning a ConvexClient singleton
ConvexClient uses PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL from $env/static/public
Both modules are importable without errors

description: Replicate client collections for all 4 tables
acceptanceCriteria: src/lib/collections/aircraft_types.ts creates and exports a client collection with schema, persistence, and Convex client
src/lib/collections/aircraft.ts does the same
src/lib/collections/airports.ts does the same
src/lib/collections/flights.ts does the same
Each collection references the correct schema, SQLite persistence, and shared Convex client
TypeScript compiles without type errors

description: Pass Logto access token to client for Convex auth
acceptanceCriteria: A server-side mechanism exists to obtain a Logto access token scoped to the Convex API resource (PUBLIC_LOGTO_API_IDENTIFIER)
The access token is available to client-side code for passing to the Convex WebSocket
The token flow works with the existing @logto/sveltekit hooks.server.ts setup
The approach follows the customJwt pattern from https://github.com/get-convex/convex-backend/issues/75#issuecomment-2918783173

description: Wire root layout with Convex provider
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/+layout.svelte calls setupConvex() from convex-svelte with PUBLIC_CONVEX_URL
Auth token fetching from Logto is wired into the Convex provider
The Convex client authenticates using the Logto access token
Existing favicon and children rendering preserved
src/routes/callback/+page.svelte exists and handles the OAuth redirect
The callback works with @logto/sveltekit server-side flow (not client-side @logto/browser)
After successful callback, user is redirected to /app/flights
Loading state is shown during callback processing

description: Update landing page for authenticated state
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/+page.svelte shows sign-in button when not authenticated
Shows sign-out button and link to /app/flights when authenticated
Uses server-provided user data (not client-side Logto SDK)
Sign in/out uses form actions (existing pattern preserved)

description: App route group with auth gate and collection init
acceptanceCriteria: src/routes/(app)/+layout.ts exists with ssr = false
src/routes/(app)/+layout.svelte exists with auth gate
Auth gate uses server-provided user data when online
Offline resilience via cached user in localStorage
All 4 Replicate collections initialized via Promise.all on mount
Shows loading state during init, redirects unauthenticated users to /
src/routes/(app)/flights/+page.svelte exists
Displays flights from Replicate collection sorted by date descending
Each flight shows date, departure, arrival, and total time
Delete button removes a flight via collection.delete()
Empty state shown when no flights exist

description: Flight entry form with OOOI time inputs
acceptanceCriteria: Flight entry form exists on the flights page with fields: date, departure airport, arrival airport, aircraft, 4 OOOI time inputs (HHMM format), remarks
OOOI times parsed via resolveOoiTime() with automatic midnight rollover
total_time computed from time_out and time_in when all 4 OOOI times present
Submitting calls collection.insert() with crypto.randomUUID() as id
Form clears after successful submission
src/routes/(app)/aircraft/+page.svelte exists
Displays list of user's aircraft with tail number and type
Form to add new aircraft with tail number and aircraft type selection
Form to add new aircraft types with type code, category, and class
Uses Replicate collections for offline-capable CRUD
static/manifest.json exists with name, short_name, start_url, display, icons
src/app.html includes <link rel='manifest' href='/manifest.json'>
src/app.html includes <meta name='theme-color'> tag

description: Service worker for offline app shell
acceptanceCriteria: src/service-worker.ts exists
Caches static assets and build output on install
Cleans old caches on activate
Cache-first for static assets, network-first for navigation
Skips Convex WebSocket traffic (*.convex.cloud)
Skips Logto auth endpoints
App shell loads on hard refresh while offline (after initial cache)

description: Vite config for Replicate WASM/worker compatibility
acceptanceCriteria: vite.config.ts includes optimizeDeps.exclude for @trestleinc/replicate (or equivalent config from current Replicate docs)
Replicate WASM worker loads without errors in dev mode
bun run dev starts without Vite bundling errors related to Replicate
